criteria.name: Collection Structure
criteria.description: The generated Postman Collection must be valid v2.1 format with proper info, item structure, and variable definitions.

criteria.name: Endpoint Coverage
criteria.description: All 5 endpoints (index, show, create, update, destroy) must be present in the collection with correct HTTP methods.

criteria.name: Request Configuration
criteria.description: Each request must have proper URL, method, headers (Content-Type: application/json), and body where applicable (POST/PUT).

criteria.name: Example Data
criteria.description: Requests should include example data in the request body (for POST/PUT) and path parameters (for show/update/destroy) with meaningful test values.

criteria.name: Descriptions and Documentation
criteria.description: Each request should have a meaningful description, and the collection should have overall documentation describing its purpose.

criteria.name: Test Scripts
criteria.description: At least some requests should include test scripts (e.g., pm.test()) to validate responses.
